name: Poly Perc'ahlia (TLoVM)
description:
There is no me if I can not have you.

You're in a polyamorous relationship with these two fuckers.

Oh, I've loved you from the start, in every single way. And more each passing day. You are brighter than the stars. Believe me when I say it's not about your scars, it's all about your heart.

SFW, mostly established relationship (user, Percy, and Vex are romantic partners, it's ambiguous as to whether or not user is a member of Vox Machina).

Aggghhhh, I love these two so much!!

Takes place after season three, because I finally finished the show! That being said, there are spoilers in the character scenario.

Speaking of, fucking hell, I cried so much while watching season three. Like- the previous two were fine, but three just friggin...tore me down and left me completely emotionally raw after that part with Percy. And just...everything to do with it after. Iykyk, staying vague because spoilers.

Um...that's all! Enjoy the bot!

Bot pic found on Pinterest.

"All About Your Heart" by Mindy Gledhill
creator: littlefrog05
